kw.name: New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": false, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "D:\\Conduit-Automate-Testing\\results\\browser\\traces\\temp\\a99bdb8f-c33a-4248-9eb4-5b10ed21b8c1"}
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: https://demo.realworld.show/
No context was open. New context was automatically opened when this page is created.
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Set Browser Timeout
kw.doc: Sets the timeout used by most input and getter keywords.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

test.name: Create New Article Successfully With user_a

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'user_a' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'user_a@example.com' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'pass123' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Get Element States
kw.doc: Get the active states from the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector a:has-text("Settings") at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Fail
kw.arg: Registration failed: 'Sign up' button is disabled due to missing or invalid data.
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'Article A' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'Desc A' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Clear Text
kw.doc: Clears the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Type Text
kw.msg: Types the text 'Body A' in the given field.
kw.doc: Types the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'tag1' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector h1:has-text("Article A") at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Take Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current window or element and saves it to disk.

kw.name: Fail
kw.arg: Article creation failed or title not visible. Check screenshot.
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.

kw.name: Run Keyword If Test Passed
Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: Logging result for user_a with status PASS to D:\Conduit-Automate-Testing\Resource/../Testdata/testdata_article.xlsx
kw.arg: Logging result for ${user} with status ${status} to ${excel_path}
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.doc: Opens xlsx document file.
